creator: henry@henryphan.com
text:
Created attachment 244271
Updates the ruby-install port to 0.9.1.

Updates the ruby-install port from 0.9.0 to 0.9.1.

Note that ruby-install may still report itself as being version 0.9.0; this has been addressed with https://github.com/postmodern/ruby-install/commit/f4978056b54f6926b5c46d86aae19a90544bdd60, and will be fixed in a future release by upstream; once that release happens, I'll update the port.
